mapper.select: SELECT id, name, username, password FROM member
SELECT id, name, username, password FROM member WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, username, password FROM member WHERE username = #{username}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member(name, username, password) VALUES(#{name}, #{username}, #{password})
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET name = #{name}, username = #{username}, password = #{password} WHERE id = #{id}
